title: Easing Banking Fears, Rate Hike Pause Boost Markets: 5 Picks
text: Thanks to the easing concerns in the banking sector and the Fed's willingness to pause rate hikes, it's wise to invest in growth stocks like Blue Bird (BLBD), Salesforce (CRM), and Deckers Outdoor (DECK).

title: Decker's (DECK) to Gain From Solid Direct-to-Consumer Business

title: Deckers Outdoor: An Attractive GARP Company
text: Deckers Outdoor is up over 50% in the past year and currently trading nearly its all-time high. The increasing popularity of HOKA and Teva should continue to be strong growth drivers.

title: Deckers Outdoor Corporation (DECK) Hits Fresh High: Is There Still Room to Run?
text: Deckers (DECK) is at a 52-week high, but can investors hope for more gains in the future? We take a look at the company's fundamentals for clues.

title: HOKA Announces Launch of the Rocket X 2: All-New and Completely Redefined

title: 4 Shoes & Retail Apparel Stocks to Watch Amid Wavering Industry Trends
text: Favorable health and wellness trends, product innovation and digital growth are likely to save the day for the Shoes and Retail Apparel industry amid rising costs. These aspects bode well for NKE, DECK, SKX and WWW.
